retry_reason: kfree_skb always succeeds and is a release operation; retrying would double-free.
contract_summary: This function acts as a drop handler for unhandled packets. It unconditionally frees the skb by calling kfree_skb(), which decrements the skb's reference count. After this call, the caller must not use the skb any further. The function always returns NET_RX_DROP to indicate the packet was dropped. It is a simple put wrapper that consumes the skb.

judge.reason: The function's sole purpose is to release the skb via kfree_skb (a put operation) and return NET_RX_DROP; there is no other logic.
